_meta.description: Curated public-record breaches at SaaS vendors that this scanner can correlate against the insured's vendor surface (S-5). Same maintenance discipline as darkweb_providers.py — confirmed-only, editorial review before adding new rows. Vendor keys match EmailVendorSurfaceChecker.VENDOR_PATTERNS exactly.

severity_levels.critical: Customer data exfiltrated from the vendor itself (vault, mailbox content, customer DB)
severity_levels.high: Customer credentials / session tokens / API keys exfiltrated (lateral compromise)
severity_levels.medium: Vendor-internal compromise; customer impact limited or downstream
severity_levels.low: Vendor incident with little / no customer data exposure

breaches.summary: Social-engineering attack on Mailchimp staff exposed 133 customer accounts including audience data.
Trezor customer data exfiltrated via Mailchimp employee phishing compromise.
Heroku (Salesforce subsidiary) GitHub OAuth-token compromise; customer source repos and Heroku API keys accessed via stolen integration tokens.
Misconfigured Salesforce Community Sites at multiple customers (bank/govt) exposed internal data; configuration-side, not platform-side.
Okta customer-support case-management system breach exposed HAR files containing session cookies/tokens for 134+ customers including 1Password, BeyondTrust, Cloudflare.
LAPSUS$ accessed Okta third-party support provider workstation; 366 customers potentially exposed for 5-day window.
Storm-0558 forged Microsoft Outlook authentication tokens via stolen consumer signing key; 25 organisations including US State Dept mailboxes accessed.
Midnight Blizzard (APT29) compromised Microsoft corporate email; source code and customer correspondence accessed.
HubSpot employee account compromised; customer contact data at ~30 crypto/fintech customers accessed.
Intercom support data exposure via shared third-party platform (HAR-file class via Okta downstream).
Zendesk employee SMS phishing led to brief unauthorised access to internal logging; no customer ticket data exfiltrated per disclosure.

_pruned.reason: Exited the 5-year lookback on 2026-06-21 (linear age-decay contribution ~0.5% at pruning, effectively nil). WATCH ITEM: alleged Adobe breach early-April 2026 (UNC6783, ~13M support tickets exfiltrated via a compromised BPO; Marketo Engage plausibly in scope, GTIG-tracked). NOT added because this DB carries confirmed incidents only. If Adobe confirms, add a fresh marketo/adobe row with the 2026 incident date and disclosed exposure_class.
